ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "privacy_level" TEXT /* Privacy level of the dataset (e.g., public, private, confidential) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization and search */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "prec" REAL /* Average precipitation in the region */,
  "jant" REAL /* Average January temperature in the region */,
  "jult" REAL /* Average July temperature in the region */,
  "ovr65" REAL /* Percentage of population over 65 in the region */,
  "popn" REAL /* Population of the region */,
  "educ" REAL /* Average education level in the region */,
  "hous" REAL /* Average housing cost in the region */,
  "dens" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "ethnic_diversity" REAL /* Measure of ethnic diversity in the region */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "healthcare_access" REAL /* Access to healthcare services in the region */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "education_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of educational levels (e.g., high school, college, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "nonw" REAL /* Percentage of non-white population in the region */,
  "wwdrk" REAL /* Percentage of workforce in the region */,
  "poor" REAL /* Percentage of population below poverty line in the region */,
  "hc" REAL /* Average household cost in the region */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide levels in the region */,
  "so2" REAL /* Sulfur dioxide levels in the region */,
  "humid" REAL /* Humidity in the region */,
  "mort" REAL /* Mortality rate in the region */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index in the region */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index in the region */,
  "green_space" REAL /* Percentage of green space in the region */,
  "noise_pollution" REAL /* Noise pollution levels in the region */,
  "waste_management" REAL /* Efficiency of waste management in the region */,
  "biodiversity" REAL /* Biodiversity index in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the region (e.g., JSON format of boundary coordinates) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used to access the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the dataset */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was shared */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the dataset was shared */,
  "share_reason" TEXT /* Reason for sharing the dataset */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_preprocessing" (
  "preprocessing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preprocessing step */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being preprocessed */,
  "preprocessing_step" TEXT /* Preprocessing step applied to the dataset */,
  "preprocessing_date" TEXT /* Date when the preprocessing step was applied */,
  "preprocessing_description" TEXT /* Description of the preprocessing step */,
  "preprocessing_status" TEXT /* Status of the preprocessing step (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied the preprocessing step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preprocessing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preprocessing_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preprocessing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being modeled */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model applied */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was applied */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization created */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that generated the result */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization that generated the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES data_visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
